feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change "Open on Key date" in the "Overdue receivables" app
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to enter a specific date in the app "Overdue receivables" in the "Open on key date" field?

Or is it just possible to choose between TODAY, TOMORROW, YESTERDAY, FIRSTDAYOFTHEYEAR,...

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: Migration/Cut-over handling for open 107/109 Goods-in-Transit process when 107 and invoice are post.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

we are currently using the Goods-in-Transit / Origin Acceptance process with movement types 107 and 109, as described in the SAP blog “Goods in transit using 107 & 109 mvt types”.

The business scenario is import procurement with long lead times, for example containers shipped by sea. Financial ownership of the goods is transferred before the goods physically arrive at the receiving plant. Therefore, in the legacy system we already post the first goods receipt step with movement type 107. This creates the valuated stock / valuated GR blocked stock in transit and also creates the accounting document. The supplier invoice is also already posted and completed in the legacy system.

During cut-over, however, some of these goods will still be physically in transit. After go-live, the physical receipt at the warehouse should happen in the new SAP S/4HANA system. In the normal process this would be the second step with movement type 109, releasing the stock from valuated GR blocked stock / stock in transit into available stock.

The challenge is that the first step, movement type 107, and the invoice have already been completed in the legacy system. Only the physical receipt step is still open and should be executed in the new system.

My question is:

What is the recommended migration and cut-over approach for this situation?

More specifically:

  1. Should the open 107/109 items be migrated into the new system as open valuated GR blocked stock / stock in transit, so that movement type 109 can be posted after go-live?
  2. How should the accounting side be handled, considering that the FI posting from movement type 107 and the supplier invoice already exist in the legacy system and should not be duplicated in the new system?
  3. Is there a SAP-recommended standard approach for such cut-over cases, or is a workaround/custom migration approach usually required?
  4. Would it be better to complete both 107 and 109 in the legacy system before cut-over and migrate the stock as normal unrestricted stock only after physical arrival, or is it feasible to technically continue the open 107/109 process across systems?

Any experience, recommended migration design, or lessons learned from similar S/4HANA cut-over projects would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Cash Journal
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Could you please suggest any standard cash journal report available in SAP Public Cloud for branch-wise consolidated reporting.

Currently, we only have the following two apps available for Cash Journal processing:

  • Post Cash Journal Entries
  • Cash Journal

However, as per the customer’s requirement, they need a branch-wise consolidated Cash Journal report. At present, we are unable to find any option or filter in the standard apps to generate the report branch-wise.

Kindly suggest if there is any standard report, or alternative solution available for branch-wise consolidated Cash Journal reporting in SAP Public Cloud.

Thanks

entry.title: Can Joule work with Situation handling in s/4 Public?
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are currently exploring the possibility of using Situation Handling to monitor job status in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, based on discussions with SAP experts, we understand that this would require either an add-on (e.g., creating a custom CDS View) or integration with SAP Cloud ALM.

At SAP SAPPHIRE 2026, we were informed that Joule will provide real-time job monitoring capabilities and can potentially work in conjunction with Situation Handling to proactively notify end users.

In this context, we would like to confirm the following:

  • Can Joule be integrated with Situation Handling?
  • If such integration is available, would it eliminate the need for additional developments (such as custom CDS Views) for job monitoring within Situation Handling, given Joule’s real-time monitoring capabilities?

We would appreciate your clarification on this matter.

m if Joule can work with Situation Handling ?

If so, it is no need to add-on in situation handling cause Joule has the real-time jobs monitoring capability .

entry.title: 【Question】SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition J60 Test Error CMD_API033・VMD_API058
entry.content:
【Question】SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition J60 Test Script
Error CMD_API033・VMD_API058 when configuring AR/AP Netting (Customer/Vendor Clearing)

Environment:
- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- J60_JP Test Script (Accounts Payable)
- Test Item: 4.1.4 AR/AP Line Items Netting (Optional)

Issue:
I registered the same Business Partner (BP) as both a vendor and customer,
and attempted to configure netting by performing the following operations:

1. In Business Partner Update (BP) app:
- Vendor Role (Finance): Enabled "Clearing with Customer" flag
- Customer Role (Finance): Enabled "Clearing with Vendor" flag

2. Upon saving, the following errors occurred:
- CMD_API033: "Customer &1: No clearing account entered"
- VMD_API058: "Vendor &1: No clearing account entered"

Questions:
To properly configure this netting functionality, please advise:

1. In which App / SSCUI
2. In which Tab or Section
3. What values need to be set

for the AR/AP clearing (netting) process to work on this Business Partner?

(Additional reference: Guidance on setting the Control GL Account would also be appreciated)

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Download TAN Exemption Details
entry.content:
The suppliers' certificate details in the business partner master data will not be able to be downloaded in any standard report or excel?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The TDS is calculated in the Auto Bill Passing (MIRO) process
entry.content:
When we use the Auto Bill Passing Tile and create an Auto MIRO, the TDS is being calculated by the system, even though the threshold limit has not yet crossed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Has anyone recently converted from 2SL to 3SL system?
entry.content:
Hello

We are on S4HANA Public cloud since 2019 and are using the 2SL-SB system. I understand that SAP now offers conversion to 3SL for existing 2SL clients. I would like to know if anyone has gone through that recently. 

I am aware of the benefits of 3SL in general. But are there any specific functional/feature differences between 2SL vs 3SL? 

Thanks,

Deepti

entry.title: Email Processing & SOST Behavior in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I hope you are doing well.

I need your help regarding SOST (Tcode) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and how the email process is managed.

I am able to maintain email and PDF templates, and for some scenarios (such as Correspondence), I can preview the email. However, this is not the case for all outputs. For example, for payment advices, I can see the PDF generated in the Manage Automatic Payments app (via the “Display PDF” functionality), but I do not see how the email is handled.

I have already maintained my email in the Business Partner as well as in Output Determination, but no email is being sent. I also checked the email monitoring applications, but they only display a status indicator with very limited details.

Could you please guide me on how to properly test and troubleshoot custom email outputs in this context?
If you have any relevant documentation or resources on this topic, I would greatly appreciate it, as I have not been able to find clear information so far.

Thank you very much for your support!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, 3-system landscape, parallel line

entry.title: Analyze Closing Run Results for Balance Sheet Reclassification
entry.content:
Hello,

in SAP Public Cloud there is an app,  Analyze Closing Run Results (F3753), where you can analyze the results of the advanced Foreign currency valuation run.

So my question is, if an app exists with witch you can analyze the results of the advanced Balance Sheet reclassification runs?

Kind regards

Fabian

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition: Automating WHT for intercompany AP/AR postings
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to ask for guidance on automating withholding tax determination for intercompany transactions in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

In my scenario, an intercompany sales document is created in the issuing company code, and the corresponding AP invoice is automatically posted in the receiving company code via IDoc. I am looking for a way to determine withholding tax automatically for these intercompany postings.

The requirement is that some intercompany transactions between the same entities are subject to withholding tax, while others are not. I am considering both:

  •             withholding tax at invoice, and
  •             withholding tax at payment.

I also need to understand the AR side of the process, because in the country version involved, assigning a withholding tax type to a condition type on the issuing side does not appear to be supported.

My questions are:

1. Is there any standard SAP approach in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition to automate WHT determination for intercompany AP postings triggered by IDoc?

2. Is there any supported design for handling the AR side when the country version does not support assigning WHT type to a condition type?

3. If standard configuration is not sufficient, is there any recommended extensibility or workaround in Public Edition to determine whether WHT should apply at invoice or payment time?

I am not looking for a manual workaround. The requirement is to keep the process automated at posting time.

Any guidance, examples, or references to SAP standard best practice would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to limit the users to use Joule Base
entry.content:
Dear SAP specialists,

One of my customers uses Joule Base in SAP Cloud ERP development environment for PoC and is now planning to enable it in production environment.

Before that, the leader of IT department has requested that Joule Base should be made available only to a limited group of users, at least during the initial production rollout.

Is it possible to restrict Joule Base usage to specific users only in SAP Cloud ERP?
As I understand, Joule Base (pop-up to input prompts) can be used by every user who can access the SAP Cloud ERP.
If it is possible, can you let me know the way?

Thanks and best regards,

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Label printing with templates stored on printer
entry.content:
Hey dear SAP-Community,

as a task I got to lookup how Label printing works in the cloud.
The customer wants to use a printer where label templates are stored directly on the printer.

I tried it with Integration Suite but there the problem is the printer being behind a firewall.
There I wanted to map/transform the received print data to ZPL format and then send it to the printer.

For me the only working solution I found regarding Public Cloud is creating an Adobe Forms Template and using Print Service + Print Manager to send file to printer.
The problem here is the creation of Adobe Forms Template as they don't want to do that.

Is there any way to use templates stored on printer in Public Cloud 2602 without creating Adobe Forms? - I mostly get to see "older" On-Prem posts.

Thanks and best regards
Luca

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud Issue While Performing Picking and PGI Using API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV in
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a challenge while using the API service API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV to create outbound deliveries, perform picking, and execute PGI activities from backend logic during material document creation.

When I test the same service using Postman with the configured communication arrangement, I am successfully able to create the delivery, perform picking, and complete PGI. However, while implementing the same logic in backend ABAP code, after successfully creating the delivery document, I am facing issues during the picking/PGI step.

Currently, I am getting the following error:

"The specified HTTP method is not allowed for the resource identified by the Data Service Request URI."

I also checked for any released business objects or RAP actions to perform picking and PGI activities, but I could not find any suitable standard business object/action for these processes.

Could you please suggest:

  • any workaround solutions,
  • standard/released business objects,
  • recommended implementation approaches,
  • relevant SAP documentation,
  • or any helpful blogs/references for this scenario?

Any guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Requirement for Reporting Purchase Order Item Revision Level
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a new requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud regarding the display of the current revision level for Purchase Order line items.

We could not identify any standard report or application that displays the current revision level of a Purchase Order item.

As part of our analysis for a custom report, we reviewed the CDS view I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01; however, the revision level field is not available in this CDS view.

We then attempted to create a custom CDS view by associating I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01 with I_PRODUCT, where the revision level field is available. However, the revision level is not being populated, even though it is maintained for the corresponding material.

Kindly advise on a suitable approach or alternative solution to fulfill this requirement.

entry.title: Configure few sales document types in CBC system
entry.content: Hi Team, need to configure few sales document types in CBC system.

entry.title: Service Contracts with Negative Values
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to create service contracts with a negative value without the revenue recognition run displaying an error? Or is it not really allowed for revenue recognition runs to have negative values?

Thanks, 
Camille

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud: advanced intercompany sales (5D2) - currency is different in IC SO and SO
entry.content:
In standard, the Sales document currency is always fetched from the customer master. In an intercompany sales scenario, this may lead to different currencies in both orders which may lead to rounding differences. 

Sales Org: France (EUR),

Customer in UK (GBP),

Delivering Plant Netherlands (EUR)

--> Customer facing sales order will show GBP and IC SO will show EUR (because Sales Org France will be the customer of IC SO)

 

Is it possible to influence the document currency of this IC SO to have consistent currencies in this whole flow?

entry.title: Cannot migrate AuC during fiscal year
entry.content:
Hi,

My transfer date is April 30, 2026, and I have two AuCs (AUC001 and AUC002) with cumulative acquisition costs posted in the same fiscal year:

  • AUC001: cumulative costs starting from January 6 2026
  • AUC002: cumulative costs starting from February 20 2026

However, I am receiving the attached error message during migration.

Could you please advise how to resolve this issue? Is there any specific requirement for migrating AuCs with cumulative values when the transfer date is within the same fiscal year?

Please see the attached screenshot for reference.

Thank you.

entry.title: Receiving point not available for selection on sales document
entry.content:
Hello

When trying to input a Receiving Point (VBKD-EMPST) in a sales document (e.g. a returns order), the message "No possible entries exist for this field" shows.

Where can I maintain receiving points to use in my returns orders?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
